common.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

landing.heroTitle: Help your child discover who they are, and where they can go.
landing.heroSubtitle: A simple, friendly personality assessment for students in grades 5 to 8, with a year-long, month-by-month plan that parents can track.
landing.point1Body: A fun, age-appropriate quiz reveals your child's personality type.
landing.point2Body: 10 to 15 suggested careers matched to who your child really is.
landing.point3Body: A 12-month plan with small tasks you and your child finish together.

login.invalidPhone: Please enter a valid 10-digit mobile number.
login.invalidOtp: That code wasn't right. Please try again.
login.invalidChild: Login code or PIN is incorrect.

consent.title: Parental Consent
consent.intro: Because this app is for children, we need your permission before we store any information about your child.
consent.point1: We store only your child's first name and grade, no full names, addresses, or school details.
consent.point2: Assessment answers are used only to generate your child's report and guidance plan.
consent.point3: You can request deletion of your child's data at any time.
consent.checkbox: I am the parent or legal guardian and I consent to my child using this app.
consent.required: Please tick the box to give consent.

onboarding.title: Add Your Child
onboarding.subtitle: You can add more children later from your dashboard.
onboarding.gradeLabel: Which grade is your child in?
onboarding.credentialsIntro: Share these with your child so they can log in and take the quiz.

assessment.welcomeTitle: Hi {name}! Let's find out more about you.
assessment.welcomeBody: There are no right or wrong answers. Just pick what feels most like you.
assessment.doneBody: Your personality type is ready. Let's look at it together.

report.baselineNote: A fully localized report for this type is on the way. Here is your summary for now.

dashboard.nothingToConfirm: Nothing to confirm right now. Great job!
dashboard.noTasks: No tasks yet. Take the quiz to get your plan!

pwa.installHint: Add DishaPath to your home screen for quick access.
